name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Swap video text into any language while keeping your original visuals intact.
problem: Brands and creators expanding into new markets face the costly, time-consuming task of rebuilding video assets from scratch just to change on-screen text. Visual Translate eliminates that rework by detecting and replacing text overlays directly within the video. This lets teams localise content faster and at a fraction of the production cost.
useCases: Localising marketing videos for international campaigns without redesigning motion graphics
Translating e-learning course videos into multiple languages for global learners
Adapting product demo videos for regional sales teams across different languages
Repurposing social media video content for multilingual audiences without reshooting
